content:
#jpmorgan is 𝗛𝗶𝗿𝗶𝗻𝗴 !

We have over 150 vacancies available for both freshers and experienced candidates seeking work-from-home opportunities. 

- Salary range: 3 to 18 LPA
- Multiple positions available: 30 for freshers and graduates

If you're interested, 𝗮𝗽𝗽𝗹𝘆 𝗻𝗼𝘄: https://lnkd.in/dJxZx-ve

𝗖𝗼𝗺𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁 'YES' and 𝗹𝗶𝗸𝗲 this post. I will review your profile and reach out if there's a match.
comment: With large-scale hiring campaigns, it’s worth encouraging candidates to verify openings on the company careers page as well. It helps avoid duplicate applications and reduces confusion around unofficial listings.
